item.title: Sébastien Fleurier
item.description:
I am a research engineer with a PhD in microbiology, specializing in the study of bacterial physiology and its responses to diverse environmental stresses, using advanced technologies such as microfluidics.

I have also been teaching in Bachelor’s and Master’s programmes for more than ten years. Over this period, I have acquired substantial experience as a professional member on several examination boards for National Education diplomas, and I serve on the examination board for the Agrégation in Biochemistry, which oversees the recruitment of future teachers.
